chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-523 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.2213/2026 2. For hearing of main case 25.02.2026. Mr. Usman Tufail Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, Advocate for the Department. --------------- Comments have been submitted on behalf of the Respondents Nos.2 & 3. Counsel appearing on behalf of the Department undertakes that the application made by the Petitioner through its tax advisor for issuance of certified copy of the Order-in-Original dated 18.11.2025 would be processed without further delay and such certified copy would be issued within 7 days so as to enable the Petitioner to avail its right of appeal. Under the circumstances, the Petition appears to have been served its purpose and stands disposed of with the direction that no coercive action ought to be taken against the Petitioner until such time the certified copy is issued. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
